    ParameterDeclaration
    Recoder2KeYConverter.convert(ParameterDeclaration pd)
    converts a recoder ParameterDeclaration to a KeY ParameterDeclaration (especially the declaration type of its parent is determined and handed over)

    Attaches a child node to a parent node and reports this if necessary.

    Attaches a child node to a parent node and reports this if necessary.
    static void
    Transformation.doAttach(ParameterDeclaration child, MethodDeclaration parent, int index)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node at a given index but does not report this.
